headline: Goldman Sachs drops a bombshell on software stocks
summary: Software stocks just recorded the worst relative performance against the S&P 500 in the sector’s entire recorded history. The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (IGV) cratered more than 24% in Q1 2026, its steepest quarterly plunge since Q4 2008. Salesforce, Adobe, Oracle, and even ...

headline: Is Adobe (ADBE) Now An Opportunity After A 36.1% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Adobe's current share price reflects its true value, this article breaks down what the numbers say about the stock. Adobe last closed at US$225.35, with shareholders seeing a 7.2% decline over the past week and a 36.1% decline over the past year. These moves may have changed how the market views its risk and return profile. Recent headlines have focused on Adobe's position in creative software and digital media tools, with discussion about competition in content...

headline: Why Cloudflare (NET) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of cloud security and performance company Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) fell 13% in the afternoon session after a UBS downgrade of ServiceNow (NOW) sent shockwaves through the sector, exacerbating a sell-off that began the previous day.
